content: Official MoonBit docs say module publication is module-scoped via moon publish, workspaces require moon -C member publish, modules use SemVer, minimal version selection consumes declared dependency versions, and clean consumers add a module then import its package. The docs confirm account login stores an API token. Current official public docs do not clearly specify namespace authority verification, version immutability, yanking, deletion, or recovery; those remain live-registry validation items, not assumed capabilities.
